api.feedback.errors.rate_limit_exceeded.text: Too many feedback submissions. Please try again later.
api.feedback.errors.rate_limit_exceeded.context: Returned when an IP exceeds the feedback endpoint rate limit (10 submissions per hour). Resolved at the HTTP edge by Onetime::Application::ErrorResolver; raised from Onetime::Security::FeedbackRateLimiter#check_feedback_rate_limit!
